title: Cobblemon Mojave
description: A WIP cobblemon datapack and resourcepack for a custom cobblemon map with tons of custom fakemons, megas, and fusions!
body:
This is a datapack for the upcoming Cobblemon map based in the Mojave region! This is still a WIP and is subject to change. I have included a link to a google drive that has full documentation on the new mons, fusions, megas, how to craft the megastones and dna splicers, abilities and moves as well!
___
How to use the pack:

Drag the datapack into your datapack folder of your world and in your resourcepack folder as well.

  **YOU MUST ALSO USE MEGASHOWDOWN AND NAVA'S ZA MEGAS OR THE PACK WILL NOT WORK**, this pack uses custom megas which need megashowdown in order to work correctly.

- If you need help with getting the datapack to work check out the offical megashowdown discord, we have a thread on there for support and help with the datapack

- New Megas (some megas use the dynamax models/designs)
___
- Credits: All designs are made by Sullivannephew and AB unless stated otherwise in the credits folder, if it is stated otherwise then there will be a link and proper crediting to the original designer. in both the datapack/resourcepack and the google drive link there is a folder with proper crediting and proof of permission from the other artists.

- Please do not use this datapack and resource pack on public P2W servers. Using it on a private small server with friends is fine though.
